view.title: View Galactic Web Node {id}
view.welcomeEmailConfirm: Are you sure you want to resend the welcome subspace transmission?
view.emailSentMessage: The welcome subspace transmission has been resent. Check your inbox.

buyIp.title: Requisition Additional Network Coordinates Addon
buyIp.costDescription: Credit Cost ({symbol}) every month as your galactic web node is invoiced
buyIp.confirmMessage: Additional Network Coordinates credit cost: {symbol}{cost}/month. Are you sure you want to requisition additional Network Coordinates?

migration.title: Migrate Your Galactic Web Node
migration.registeredUsername: Registered Crew Designation / Subspace Address / ID
migration.holdingPageQuestion: If the site is live/busy site having high traffic, can we set a holding beacon during migration?
migration.specialRequirementsQuestion: Does this site have special requirements like PHP Version / Modules?
migration.transferDomainQuestion: Do you also want us to help you transfer the sector registration?
migration.updateNameserversQuestion: Do you want us to update the navigation beacons as soon as we finish the data migration?
migration.note1: Filling out this form will initialize a new incident log for our Federation Support Division to begin your migration.
migration.note2: Please be as complete and accurate as possible to avoid any delays.
migration.note3: A typical migration is completed within 48 to 72 hours. Sometimes longer if the amount of data to copy is large.
migration.note4: The old hosting profile needs to be online and accessible while we are performing the migration, otherwise we may face difficulty.
migration.note5: Please do not make any updates on your site while we perform the migration, otherwise those data may not be copied to the new hosting.
